MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff 449 O'Farrell Street LLC is present. Represented by Anne Rolandi.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Valerie Campbell is present.
Attorney Tracy Huang Harrison representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of FEB-14-2012 is vacated.
